title: SKT's Shorter Grass
description: make tall grass shorter by 14 pixel, and short grass shorter by 4 pixel (works with other resource pack)
body: ![SG](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e64fb4b46ecf65373cced710c8edd3dd718235ed.jpeg) ### ![Batas](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e5c65545eff131020a7c59230e82c1ce6d9540d2_0.webp) ### 📖⠄Description make tall grass shorter by 14 pixel and short grass shorter by 4 pixel (works with other resource pack) ### ⚠️⠄Important make sure this resource pack is above other resource packs ### 🖼️⠄Ingame Screenshot ### ![SS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d35ae64779b887afa1b1d68883cf405b53b58cab.jpeg) ### ![Batas](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e5c65545eff131020a7c59230e82c1ce6d9540d2_0.webp) ### 👋🏼⠄Follow Me
